title: Remove Duplicate Item on mOnday CRM
excerpt:
Hello - We have integrated our CRMS with various lead generations platforms (website, social, chat, etc)

posts.author: dafinney12 (David Finney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello - We have integrated our CRMS with various lead generations platforms (website, social, chat, etc)

What is the best way to prevent duplicates from entering the CRM? For example, we may have one person submit their info twice, or submit it on two different platforms.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @dafinney12
Welcome to the community

You can choose various ways on how to deal with the duplicates using the Duplicates and Uniques app. You can label, merge, delete or move them.
Even better, you can do all these automatically.

Here is a demo of how to automatically delete duplicates in your board using the app.

posts.author: dafinney12 (David Finney)
posts.cookedHtml: Ok, I’ve requested to add that app. Do you know how long that usually takes?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @dafinney12,
The request is made to your monday.com account admin. You can therefore contact your admin to process the approval.
